title: Boba Fett's Armor: An Essential Guide to a Walking Weapon
content:
{{Top|rwm}}
[[File:Bobafettarmor.jpg|thumb|right|Full armor]]
"'''Boba Fett's Armor: An Essential Guide to a Walking Weapon'''" is an illustration developed by [[Bill Smith]] for the ''[[Star Wars: Boba Fett]]'' magazine published in [[April]] [[1998]] by the editors of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector]]''. The illustration shows a full-body picture of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and points out many features of his [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]].
